name: Lemon Ice-Box Pie-n
recipeIngredient: 2 (3 ounce each) packages softened cream cheese
1 (3 1/2 ounce) package instant lemon pudding mix
1/4 cup finely crushed lemon drop hard candies
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Mix the cookie crumbs, ground almonds, butter, sugar and heavy cream together. Pat the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a nine-inch pie pan. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes. Set aside to cool.
For filling: Mix the powdered sugar, softened cream cheese, sour cream and whipped topping until smooth and creamy. Spread over the bottom of the cooled crust. Mix the lemon pudding and pie mix according to package directions, milk, lemon juice and grated lemon rind. Spread over the cream cheese layer in the crust. Refrigerate for one hour.
For topping: Spread whipped topping over the top of the pie and sprinkle with crushed lemon candies. Refrigerate.
